yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Fortinet_Issues_Emergency_Patch_for_Fort {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Fortinet Issues Emergency Patch for FortiClient Zero-Day"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-07"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "FortiClient" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202635616_Fortinet_fixes_actively_exp {
    meta:

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 2027 threat advisories. Of these, 13 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 73 as HIGH risk. 24 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include multiple unattributed groups. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators
